reason: Chain-of-thought is a fundamental reasoning skill that will improve the accuracy of all future answers. I have 2 SP available and only need 1 XP to reach the next SP threshold.
Unlocking pe_plan grants access to a planning phase and a reflection call, which significantly increases the reliability of my answers and provides a safety net against HP loss.
Unlocking Reflection++ will provide a critical safety net for higher-level questions by allowing a dedicated review step to catch potential errors before final submission.
